mapper.select: SELECT a.cate_id, a.cate_name, a.depth, a.display_seq, a.parent_id, a.type FROM ELIB_CATEGORY a WHERE a.delete_yn = 'N' AND a.cate_id = #{cate_id}
SELECT cate_id, cate_name, depth, display_seq, parent_id, type FROM ELIB_CATEGORY WHERE delete_yn = 'N' AND parent_id = #{cate_id} ORDER BY display_seq
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM ELIB_CATEGORY WHERE delete_yn = 'N' AND parent_id = #{cate_id}
SELECT NVL(MAX(depth),0)+1 FROM ELIB_CATEGORY WHERE delete_yn = 'N' AND cate_id = #{parent_id} AND type = #{type}
SELECT NVL(MAX(display_seq),0)+1 AS display_seq FROM ELIB_CATEGORY WHERE delete_yn = 'N' AND depth = #{depth} AND type = #{type}
mapper.delete: UPDATE ELIB_CATEGORY SET delete_yn = 'Y' WHERE cate_id = #{cate_id}
DELETE FROM ELIB_CATEGORY WHERE cate_id = #{cate_id} OR parent_id = #{parent_id}
mapper.select: SELECT cate_id, cate_name, depth, display_seq, parent_id, type, add_date, add_id FROM ELIB_CATEGORY WHERE delete_yn = 'N' AND type = #{type} AND depth = '1' AND cate_name = #{cate_name} AND ROWNUM = 1

SELECT cate_id, cate_name, depth, display_seq, parent_id, type, add_date, add_id FROM ELIB_CATEGORY WHERE delete_yn = 'N' AND type = #{type} AND depth = '2' AND cate_name = #{cate_name} AND ROWNUM = 1
SELECT cate_id, cate_name, depth, display_seq, parent_id, type FROM ELIB_CATEGORY WHERE delete_yn = 'N' AND depth = 1 ORDER BY DECODE(type, 'EBK', 1, 'ADO', 2, 'WEB', 3, 9), display_seq, cate_id
